claimText: Peking University's AI Scientific Integrity Platform defines AI use boundaries across seven research stages: topic selection, literature search and management, research design and implementation, paper writing, paper submission, paper review, and grant application and review.
evidenceSnippetOriginal: 覆盖论文选题、文献检索与管理、研究设计与实施、论文写作、论文投稿、论文评审、基金申报与评审七个研究环节。

citation.citationTitle: 使用规范说明 - AI科研诚信平台
